attributes.label: Number
attributes.name: Number
attributes.description: State License INTEGER. A unique license INTEGER is listed for each license the physician holds. There is no standard format syntax. Format examples: 18986, 4301079019, BX1464089. There is also no limit to the INTEGER of licenses a physician can hold in a state. Example: A physician can have an inactive resident license plus unlimited active licenses. Residents can have as many as four licenses since some states issue licenses every year

attributes.label: Category
attributes.name: Category
attributes.description: Category of the license assigned to the practitioner

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: State License Type. U = Unlimited there is no restriction on the physician to practice medicine; L = Limited implies restrictions of some sort. For example, the physician may practice only in a given county, admit patients only to particular hospitals, or practice under the supervision of a physician with a license in state or private hospitals or other settings;  T = Temporary issued to a physician temporarily practicing in an underserved area outside his/her state of licensure. Also granted between board meetings when new licenses are issued. Time span for a temporary license varies from state to state. Temporary licenses typically expire 6-9 months from the date they are issued; R = Resident License granted to a physician in graduate medical education (e.g., residency training).

attributes.label: Board Code
attributes.name: BoardCode
attributes.description: State License Board Code. For AMA The board code will always be AMA

attributes.label: Degree
attributes.name: Degree
attributes.description: State License Degree. A physician may hold more than one license in a given state. However, not more than one MD or more than one DO license in the same state.

attributes.label: Status
attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: State License Status. A = Active.  Physician is licensed to practice within the state; I = Inactive. If the physician has not reregistered a state license OR if the license has been suspended or revoked by the state board;  X = unknown. If the state has not provided current information Note: Some state boards issue inactive licenses to physicians who want to maintain licensure in the state although they are currently practicing in another state.

attributes.description: State License as of date or pull date. The as of date (or stamp date) is the date the current license file is provided to the Database Licensees.

attributes.label: Number
attributes.name: Number
attributes.description: State License INTEGER. A unique license INTEGER is listed for each license the physician holds. There is no standard format syntax. Format examples: 18986, 4301079019, BX1464089. There is also no limit to the INTEGER of licenses a physician can hold in a state. Example: A physician can have an inactive resident license plus unlimited active licenses. Residents can have as many as four licenses since some states issue licenses every year

attributes.label: Category
attributes.name: Category
attributes.description: Category of the license assigned to the practitioner

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: State License Type. U = Unlimited there is no restriction on the physician to practice medicine; L = Limited implies restrictions of some sort. For example, the physician may practice only in a given county, admit patients only to particular hospitals, or practice under the supervision of a physician with a license in state or private hospitals or other settings;  T = Temporary issued to a physician temporarily practicing in an underserved area outside his/her state of licensure. Also granted between board meetings when new licenses are issued. Time span for a temporary license varies from state to state. Temporary licenses typically expire 6-9 months from the date they are issued; R = Resident License granted to a physician in graduate medical education (e.g., residency training).

entityTypes.label: Clinical Study
entityTypes.description: A research study involving human volunteers (also called participants) that is intended to add to medical knowledge. There are two types of clinical studies: interventional studies (also called clinical trials) and observational studies.

attributes.label: Commenters
attributes.name: Commenters
attributes.description: Commenters

attributes.label: NCT Id
attributes.name: NCTId
attributes.description: The unique identification code given to each clinical study upon registration at ClinicalTrials.gov. The format is 'NCT' followed by an 8-digit number. Also known as ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier

attributes.label: Study Id
attributes.name: StudyId
attributes.description: Unique Protocol Identification Number

attributes.label: Identifiers
attributes.name: Identifiers
attributes.description: A business identifier associated with this clinical Study

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: An identifier(s) (ID), if any, other than the organization's Unique Protocol Identification Number

attributes.label: ID
attributes.name: ID
attributes.description: Value of the identifier issued to the clinical Study

attributes.label: URL
attributes.name: URL
attributes.description: URL link based on OrgStudyId and OrgStudyIdType

attributes.label: Brief Title
attributes.name: Title
attributes.description: A short title of the clinical study written in language intended for the lay public. The title should include, where possible, information on the participants, condition being evaluated, and intervention(s) studied.

attributes.label: Official Title
attributes.name: OfficialTitle
attributes.description: The title of the clinical study, corresponding to the title of the protocol.

attributes.label: Acronym
attributes.name: Acronym
attributes.description: An acronym or abbreviation used publicly to identify the clinical study, if any

attributes.label: Status
attributes.name: Status
attributes.description: Overall Recruitment Status or Expanded Access Status

attributes.label: Overall Status
attributes.name: OverallStatus
attributes.description: Overall Recruitment Status or Expanded Access Status

attributes.label: Status Verified Date
attributes.name: StatusVerifiedDate
attributes.description: The date on which the responsible party last verified the clinical study information

attributes.label: Delayed Posting
attributes.name: DelayedPosting
attributes.description: At least one studied FDA-regulated device product has not been previously approved or cleared by FDA. Recruitment status is set to 'Withheld'

attributes.label: Reason Stopped
attributes.name: WhyStopped
attributes.description: Reason given for 'Suspended', 'Terminated' and 'Withdrawn' studies

attributes.label: Expanded Access Info
attributes.name: ExpandedAccessInfo
attributes.description: EA study info related to an INT/OBS study. Is in the Study Status module for an EA record and in the Oversight module for a study that has EA

attributes.label: Expanded Access
attributes.name: HasExpandedAccess
attributes.description: An investigational drug product (including biological product) can be available through expanded access for patients who do not qualify for enrollment in a clinical trial.

attributes.label: Expanded Access NCTId
attributes.name: ExpandedAccessNCTId
attributes.description: Data Provider can indicate there is an EA study associated with an INT study but does not have an NCTfor the EA study

attributes.label: Expanded Access Status For NCTId
attributes.name: ExpandedAccessStatusForNCTId
attributes.description: Recruitment status of the EA study that's linked to INT/OBS

attributes.label: Start Date
attributes.name: StartDate
attributes.description: The estimated date on which the clinical study will be open for recruitment of participants, or the actual date on which the first participant was enrolled.

attributes.label: End Date
attributes.name: EndDate
attributes.description: The date the final participant was examined or received an intervention for purposes of final collection of data for the primary and secondary outcome measures and adverse events

attributes.label: Results First Submit Date
attributes.name: ResultsFirstSubmitDate
attributes.description: The date on which the study sponsor or investigator first submits a study record with summary results information.

attributes.label: Results First Submit QC Date
attributes.name: ResultsFirstSubmitQCDate
attributes.description: The date on which the study results are submitted that is consistent with National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review criteria.

attributes.label: Results First Post Date
attributes.name: ResultsFirstPostDate
attributes.description: The date on which summary results information was first available on ClinicalTrials.gov after National Library of Medicine (NLM) quality control (QC) review has concluded.

attributes.label: Certification/Extension First Submitted Date
attributes.name: DispFirstSubmitDate
attributes.description: Certification/Extension (aka Delayed Results) First Submitted Date

attributes.label: Certification/Extension Submitted QC Date
attributes.name: DispFirstSubmitQCDate
attributes.description: Certification/extension first submitted that met QC criteria

attributes.label: Certification/Extension First Posted Date
attributes.name: DispFirstPostDate
attributes.description: The date on which information about a certification to delay submission of results or an extension request was first available

attributes.label: Last Update Submit Date
attributes.name: LastUpdateSubmitDate
attributes.description: The most recent date on which the study sponsor or investigator submitted changes to a study record

attributes.label: Investigators
attributes.name: HCP
attributes.description: A researcher involved in a clinical study. Related terms include site principal investigator, site sub-investigator, study chair, study director, and study principal investigator

attributes.label: Sponsor
attributes.name: Sponsor
attributes.description: The organization who initiates the study and who has authority and control over the study.

attributes.label: Collaborator
attributes.name: Collaborator
attributes.description: Other organizations, if any, providing support. Support may include funding, design, implementation, data analysis or reporting.

attributes.label: Oversight Info
attributes.name: OversightInfo
attributes.description: Oversight Information

attributes.label: Has Data Monitoring Committee
attributes.name: OversightHasDMC
attributes.description: Indicate whether a data monitoring committee has been appointed for this study.

attributes.label: IsFDARegulatedDrug
attributes.name: IsFDARegulatedDrug
attributes.description: Indication that a clinical study is studying a drug product (including a biological product) subject to section 505 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act or to section 351 of the Public Health Service Act.

attributes.label: IsFDARegulatedDevice
attributes.name: IsFDARegulatedDevice
attributes.description: Indication that a clinical study is studying a device product subject to section 510(k), 515, or 520(m) of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.

attributes.label: Is Unapproved Device
attributes.name: IsUnapprovedDevice
attributes.description: Indication that at least one device product studied in the clinical study has not been previously approved or cleared by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for one or more uses.

attributes.label: Pediatric Postmarket Surveillance of a Device Product
attributes.name: IsPPSD
attributes.description: Indication that a clinical study that includes a U.S. FDA-regulated device product is a pediatric postmarket surveillance of a device product ordered under section 522 of the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act.

attributes.label: Product Exported from US
attributes.name: IsUSExport
attributes.description: Whether any drug product (including a biological product) or device product studied in the clinical study is manufactured in the United States or one of its territories and exported for study in a clinical study in another country.

attributes.label: FDA AA801 Violation
attributes.name: FDAAA801Violation
attributes.description: FDA AA801 Violation

attributes.label: Brief Summary
attributes.name: BriefSummary
attributes.description: A short description of the clinical study, including a brief statement of the clinical study's hypothesis, written in language intended for the lay public.

attributes.label: Detailed Description
attributes.name: DetailedDescription
attributes.description: Extended description of the protocol, including more technical information (as compared to the Brief Summary), if desired.

attributes.label: Disease/Conditions
attributes.name: Condition
attributes.description: Primary Disease or Condition Being Studied in the Trial, or the Focus of the Study.

attributes.label: Therapeutic Area
attributes.name: TherapeuticArea
attributes.description: Therapeutic Area to which the Condition being studied belongs to

attributes.label: Study Type
attributes.name: StudyType
attributes.description: The nature of the investigation or investigational use for which clinical study information is being submitted.

attributes.label: Expanded Access Types
attributes.name: ExpandedAccessTypes
attributes.description: The type(s) of expanded access for which the investigational drug product is available, as specified in U.S. FDA regulations

attributes.label: Expanded Access Type Individual
attributes.name: ExpAccTypeIndividual
attributes.description: Allows a single patient, with a serious disease or condition who cannot participate in a clinical trial, access to a drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA.

attributes.label: Expanded Access Type Intermediate
attributes.name: ExpAccTypeIntermediate
attributes.description: This type of expanded access is used when multiple patients with the same disease or condition seek access to a specific drug or biological product that has not been approved by the FDA.

attributes.label: Expanded Access Type Treatment
attributes.name: ExpAccTypeTreatment
attributes.description: This type of expanded access can only be provided if the product is already being developed for marketing for the same use as the expanded access use.

attributes.label: Patient Registry
attributes.name: PatientRegistry
attributes.description: A type of observational study that collects information about patients' medical conditions and/or treatments to better understand how a condition or treatment affects patients in the real world.

attributes.label: Target Duration
attributes.name: TargetDuration
attributes.description: For Patient Registries, the anticipated time period over which each participant is to be followed.Provide a number and Unit of Time (years, months, weeks, days).

attributes.label: Phase
attributes.name: Phase
attributes.description: For a clinical trial of a drug product (including a biological product), the numerical phase of such clinical trial

attributes.label: Study Design Info
attributes.name: DesignInfo
attributes.description: Study Design Info

attributes.label: Allocation
attributes.name: DesignAllocation
attributes.description: A method used to assign participants to an arm of a clinical study. The types of allocation are randomized allocation and nonrandomized.

attributes.label: Intervention Model
attributes.name: DesignInterventionModel
attributes.description: The general design of the strategy for assigning interventions to participants in a clinical study.

attributes.label: Intervention Model Description
attributes.name: DesignInterventionModelDescription
attributes.description: A description of the manner in which the clinical trial will be conducted

attributes.label: Design Time Perspective
attributes.name: DesignTimePerspective
attributes.description: Temporal relationship of observation period to time of participant enrollment.

attributes.label: Observational Model
attributes.name: DesignObservationalModel
attributes.description: Primary strategy for participant identification and follow-up

attributes.label: Primary Purpose
attributes.name: DesignPrimaryPurpose
attributes.description: A description of the manner in which the clinical trial will be conducted

attributes.label: Design Masking
attributes.name: DesignMasking
attributes.description: A clinical trial design strategy in which one or more parties involved in the trial, such as the investigator or participants, do not know which participants have been assigned which interventions. Types of masking include: open label, single blind masking, and double-blind masking.

attributes.label: Design Masking Description
attributes.name: DesignMaskingDescription
attributes.description: Information about other parties who may be masked in the clinical trial

attributes.label: Design Who Masked
attributes.name: DesignWhoMasked
attributes.description: Who Masked: The party or parties involved in the clinical trial who are prevented from having knowledge of the interventions assigned to individual participants.

attributes.label: Biospec Retention
attributes.name: BioSpecRetention
attributes.description: Indicate whether samples of material from research participants are retained in a biorepository.

attributes.label: Biospec Description
attributes.name: BioSpecDescription
attributes.description: Specify all types of biospecimens to be retained (e.g., whole blood, serum, white cells, urine, tissue).

attributes.label: Enrollment Info
attributes.name: EnrollmentInfo
attributes.description: Enrollment Information about the subjects

attributes.label: Enrollment
attributes.name: Enrollment
attributes.description: The estimated total number of participants to be enrolled (target number) or the actual total number of participants that are enrolled in the clinical study.

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Can be Actual or Estimated.

attributes.label: Arm Group
attributes.name: ArmGroup
attributes.description: A description of each arm of the clinical trial that indicates its role in the clinical trial.

attributes.label: Arm Group Label
attributes.name: ArmGroupLabel
attributes.description: The short name used to identify the arm. Arm Title for INT, Group/Cohort Title for OBS

attributes.label: Arm Group Type
attributes.name: ArmGroupType
attributes.description: The role of each arm in the clinical trial.

attributes.label: Description
attributes.name: ArmGroupDescription
attributes.description: If needed, additional descriptive information (including which interventions are administered in each arm) to differentiate each arm from other arms in the clinical trial.

attributes.label: Arm Group Interventions
attributes.name: ArmGroupInterventions
attributes.description: Arm/Group and Intervention Cross Reference

attributes.label: Arm Group Intervention Name
attributes.name: ArmGroupInterventionName
attributes.description: Arm/Group and Intervention Cross Reference

attributes.label: Interventions
attributes.name: Intervention
attributes.description: Intervention associated with an arm/group or the investigational product available for expanded access

attributes.label: Intervention Type
attributes.name: InterventionType
attributes.description: Intervention Type: General types of interventions

attributes.label: Intervention Name
attributes.name: InterventionName
attributes.description: A brief descriptive name used to refer to the investigational product. A non-proprietary name of the intervention must be used, if available.

attributes.label: Intervention Other Names
attributes.name: InterventionOtherNameList
attributes.description: Other current and former name(s) or alias(es), if any, different from the Intervention Name(s)

attributes.label: Intervention Other Name
attributes.name: InterventionOtherName
attributes.description: Other current and former name(s) or alias(es), if any, different from the Intervention Name(s)

attributes.label: Intervention Arm Group Label List
attributes.name: InterventionArmGroupLabelList
attributes.description: Arm/Group and Intervention Cross Reference

attributes.label: Intervention Arm Group Label
attributes.name: InterventionArmGroupLabel
attributes.description: Arm Group Label for Intervention

attributes.label: Intervention Description
attributes.name: InterventionDescription
attributes.description: Details that can be made public about the intervention

attributes.label: Drug
attributes.name: Drug
attributes.description: Drug involved in the clinical study

attributes.label: Outcomes
attributes.name: Outcomes
attributes.description: A planned measurement described in the protocol that is used to determine the effect of an intervention/treatment on participants.  Types of outcome measures include primary outcome measure and secondary outcome measure.

attributes.label: Type
attributes.name: Type
attributes.description: Type of outcomes, Example: Primary, Secondary

attributes.label: Measure
attributes.name: Measure
attributes.description: Name of the specific outcome measure

attributes.label: Description
attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: A description of each primary and secondary outcome measure

attributes.label: Time Frame
attributes.name: TimeFrame
attributes.description: Time point(s) at which the measurement was assessed for the specific metric used.

attributes.label: Eligibility
attributes.name: Eligibility
attributes.description: Criteria for selection of participants in the clinical study

attributes.label: Eligibility Criteria
attributes.name: EligibilityCriteria
attributes.description: Key requirements that people who want to participate in a clinical study must meet or the characteristics they must have

attributes.label: HealthyVolunteers
attributes.name: HealthyVolunteers
attributes.description: Indication that participants who do not have a disease or condition, or related conditions or symptoms, under study in the clinical study are permitted to participate in the clinical study.

attributes.label: Gender
attributes.name: Gender
attributes.description: Gender of the participants eligible to participate in the clinical study, or for whom EA is available.

attributes.label: Gender Based Eligbility
attributes.name: GenderBased
attributes.description: Whether the study is gender-based: If applicable, indicate whether participant eligibility is based on gender.

attributes.label: Gender Description
attributes.name: GenderDescription
attributes.description: If applicable, indicate whether participant eligibility is based on gender.

attributes.label: Minimum Age
attributes.name: MinimumAge
attributes.description: The numerical value, if any, for the minimum age a potential participant must meet to be eligible for the clinical study.

attributes.label: Maximum Age
attributes.name: MaximumAge
attributes.description: The numerical value, if any, for the maximum age a potential participant can be to be eligible for the clinical study.

attributes.label: Std Ages
attributes.name: StdAges
attributes.description: Calculated StdAge ex. Child, Adult, Older adult if there is minimumAge and/or maximimumAge entered

attributes.label: Study Pop
attributes.name: StudyPopulation
attributes.description: A description of the population from which the groups or cohorts will be selected (for example, primary care clinic, community sample, residents of a certain town).

attributes.label: Sampling Method
attributes.name: SamplingMethod
attributes.description: Indicate the method used for the sampling approach and explain in the Detailed Description.

attributes.label: Reference
attributes.name: Reference
attributes.description: Citations to publications related to the protocol

attributes.label: Reference PMID
attributes.name: ReferencePMID
attributes.description: Providers either enter the PubMed Unique Identifier (PMID) of an article

attributes.label: Reference Type
attributes.name: ReferenceType
attributes.description: Indicate whether is a Result reference, background or derived.

attributes.label: Reference Citation
attributes.name: ReferenceCitation
attributes.description: A bibliographic reference in NLM's MEDLINE format

attributes.label: Retraction
attributes.name: Retraction
attributes.description: Retractions

attributes.label: Retraction PMID
attributes.name: RetractionPMID
attributes.description: PMID for publication retraction

attributes.label: Retraction Source
attributes.name: RetractionSource
attributes.description: Source

attributes.label: See Also Link
attributes.name: SeeAlsoLink
attributes.description: See Also Links

attributes.label: See Also Link Label
attributes.name: SeeAlsoLinkLabel
attributes.description: See Also Link Label Title

attributes.label: See Also Link URL
attributes.name: SeeAlsoLinkURL
attributes.description: A web site directly relevant to the protocol may be entered

attributes.label: Available individual participant data
attributes.name: AvailIPD
attributes.description: The individual participant data (IPD) sets and supporting information that are being shared for the study.

attributes.label: Available IPD Id
attributes.name: AvailIPDId
attributes.description: Identifier

attributes.label: Available IPD Type
attributes.name: AvailIPDType
attributes.description: The type of data set or supporting information being shared

attributes.label: Available IPD URL
attributes.name: AvailIPDURL
attributes.description: The web address used to request or access the data set or supporting information.

attributes.label: Available IPD Comment
attributes.name: AvailIPDComment
attributes.description: Additional information including the name of the data repository or other location where the data set or supporting information is available.

attributes.label: IPD Sharing Statement
attributes.name: IPDSharingStatementModule
attributes.description: Whether there is a plan to make individual participant data (IPD) collected in this study, including data dictionaries, available to other researchers

attributes.label: Sharing IPD
attributes.name: IPDSharing
attributes.description: Indicate whether there is a plan to make individual participant data (IPD) collected in this study, including data dictionaries, available to other researchers (typically after the end of the study).

attributes.label: IPD Description
attributes.name: IPDSharingDescription
attributes.description: Additional information including the name of the data repository or other location where the data set or supporting information is available.

attributes.label: IPD Sharing Info Type
attributes.name: IPDSharingInfoType
attributes.description: The type(s) of supporting information that will be shared, in addition to the individual participant data set and data dictionaries for the IPD itself.

attributes.label: IPD Sharing Time Frame
attributes.name: IPDSharingTimeFrame
attributes.description: A description of when the IPD and any additional supporting information will become available and for how long, including the start and end dates or period of availability.

attributes.label: IPD Sharing Access Criteria
attributes.name: IPDSharingAccessCriteria
attributes.description: Describe by what access criteria IPD and any additional supporting information will be shared, including with whom, for what types of analyses, and by what mechanism.

attributes.label: IPD Sharing URL
attributes.name: IPDSharingURL
attributes.description: The web address, if any, used to find additional information about the plan to share IPD.

attributes.label: Flow Pre Assignment Details
attributes.name: FlowPreAssignmentDetails
attributes.description: Description of significant events in the study (for example, wash out, run-in) that occur after participant enrollment, but prior to assignment of participants to an arm or group, if any.

attributes.label: Flow Recruitment Details
attributes.name: FlowRecruitmentDetails
attributes.description: Key information relevant to the recruitment process for the overall study

attributes.label: Flow Type Units Analyzed
attributes.name: FlowTypeUnitsAnalyzed
attributes.description: If assignment is based on a unit other than participants, a description of the unit of assignment (for example, eyes, lesions, implants).

attributes.label: Flow Group
attributes.name: FlowGroup
attributes.description: Arms or groups for describing the flow of participants through the clinical study.

attributes.label: Flow Group ID
attributes.name: FlowGroupId
attributes.description: Arm/Group ID generated

attributes.label: Flow Group Title
attributes.name: FlowGroupTitle
attributes.description: Descriptive label used to identify each arm or group.

attributes.label: Flow Group Description
attributes.name: FlowGroupDescription
attributes.description: Brief description of each arm or group.

attributes.label: Flow Period
attributes.name: FlowPeriod
attributes.description: Discrete stages of a clinical study during which numbers of participants at specific significant events or points of time are reported.

attributes.label: Flow Period Title
attributes.name: FlowPeriodTitle
attributes.description: Title describing a stage of the study

attributes.label: Flow Milestone
attributes.name: FlowMilestone
attributes.description: Any specific events or time points in the study when the numbers of participants (and units, if applicable) are reported.

attributes.label: Flow Milestone Type
attributes.name: FlowMilestoneType
attributes.description: Started, Completed and any additional Milestone type name

attributes.label: Flow Milestone Comment
attributes.name: FlowMilestoneComment
attributes.description: Additional information about the milestone or Milestone Data.

attributes.label: Flow Achievement
attributes.name: FlowAchievement
attributes.description: Milestone Data (per arm/group)

attributes.label: Flow Achievement GroupId
attributes.name: FlowAchievementGroupId
attributes.description: ID

attributes.label: Flow Achievement Comment
attributes.name: FlowAchievementComment
attributes.description: Milestone Comment

attributes.label: Flow Achievement Number of Subjects
attributes.name: FlowAchievementNumSubjects
attributes.description: Number of participants to reach the milestone, in each arm/group.

attributes.label: Flow Achievement Number Units
attributes.name: FlowAchievementNumUnits
attributes.description: The number of units to reach the milestone. Could be different than participants. For example: eyes, legs, visits, etc.

attributes.label: Flow Drop Withdraw
attributes.name: FlowDropWithdraw
attributes.description: Additional information about participants who did not complete the study or period.

attributes.label: Flow Drop Withdraw Type
attributes.name: FlowDropWithdrawType
attributes.description: Reason why participants did not complete the study or period.

attributes.label: Flow Drop Withdraw Comment
attributes.name: FlowDropWithdrawComment
attributes.description: A brief description of the reason for non-completion

attributes.label: Flow Reason
attributes.name: FlowReason
attributes.description: Reason for Not Completed per arm/group

attributes.label: Flow Reason GroupId
attributes.name: FlowReasonGroupId
attributes.description: ID for reason not completed per arm/group

attributes.label: Flow Reason Comment
attributes.name: FlowReasonComment
attributes.description: Comment

attributes.label: Flow Reason Number of Subjects
attributes.name: FlowReasonNumSubjects
attributes.description: Number of participants in each arm or group that did not complete the study or period, for each Reason Not Completed

attributes.label: Baseline Population Description
attributes.name: BaselinePopulationDescription
attributes.description: A brief description of how the analysis population was determined.

attributes.label: Baseline Type Units Analyzed
attributes.name: BaselineTypeUnitsAnalyzed
attributes.description: If the analysis is based on a unit other than participants, a description of the unit of analysis (for example, eyes, lesions, implants).

attributes.label: Baseline Group
attributes.name: BaselineGroup
attributes.description: Arms or comparison groups in the study, including all participants assessed at baseline as specified in the pre-specified protocol and/or statistical analysis plan.

attributes.label: Baseline GroupId
attributes.name: BaselineGroupId
attributes.description: Identifier

attributes.label: Baseline Group Title
attributes.name: BaselineGroupTitle
attributes.description: Descriptive label used to identify each arm or comparison group.

attributes.label: Baseline Group Description
attributes.name: BaselineGroupDescription
attributes.description: Brief description of each arm or comparison group.

attributes.label: Baseline Denom
attributes.name: BaselineDenom
attributes.description: Structure for Overall Baseline Measure Data

attributes.label: Baseline Denom Units
attributes.name: BaselineDenomUnits
attributes.description: If the analysis is based on a unit other than participants, the number of all units for which baseline measures were measured and analyzed, in each arm/group and in the entire study population (total).

attributes.label: Baseline Denom Count
attributes.name: BaselineDenomCount
attributes.description: Structure for overall number per arm/group

attributes.label: Baseline Denom Count GroupId
attributes.name: BaselineDenomCountGroupId
attributes.description: ID for each Arm/Group

attributes.label: Baseline Denom Count Value
attributes.name: BaselineDenomCountValue
attributes.description: Count value of BaselineDenomUnit

attributes.label: Baseline Measure
attributes.name: BaselineMeasure
attributes.description: A description of each baseline or demographic characteristic measured in the clinical study.

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Title
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureTitle
attributes.description: The name of the baseline or demographic characteristic measured in the clinical study

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Description
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDescription
attributes.description: Baseline Measure Title for Study-Specified Measure

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Population Description
attributes.name: BaselineMeasurePopulationDescription
attributes.description: Additional descriptive information about the baseline measure

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Param Type
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureParamType
attributes.description: The type of data for the baseline measure

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Dispersion Type
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDispersionType
attributes.description: Dispersion type based on paramType

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Unit Of Measure
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureUnitOfMeasure
attributes.description: An explanation of what is quantified by the data (for example, participants, mm Hg), for each baseline measure.

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Calculate Pct
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureCalculatePct
attributes.description: Percentage of BaselineMeasurementValue/BaselineMeasureDenomCountValue

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom Units Selected
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenomUnitsSelected
attributes.description: Type of units selected (e.g., participants, eyes, arms)

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenom
attributes.description: Analysis Population

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom Units
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenomUnits
attributes.description: Analysis Population Type (selected from Unit of Measure per Baseline Measure)

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom Count
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenomCount
attributes.description: Number entered for unit of measure

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom Count GroupId
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenomCountGroupId
attributes.description: ID for each Arm/Group

attributes.label: Baseline Measure Denom Count Value
attributes.name: BaselineMeasureDenomCountValue
attributes.description: Number entered per arm/group for unit of measures

attributes.label: Baseline Class
attributes.name: BaselineClass
attributes.description: Structure for a Baseline Measure

attributes.label: Baseline Class Title
attributes.name: BaselineClassTitle
attributes.description: Baseline row title

attributes.label: Baseline Class Denom
attributes.name: BaselineClassDenom
attributes.description: Possible analysis population when data are presented

attributes.label: Baseline Class Denom Units
attributes.name: BaselineClassDenomUnits
attributes.description: Possible analysis population when data are presented

attributes.label: Baseline Class Denom Count
attributes.name: BaselineClassDenomCount
attributes.description: Population Analyzed

attributes.label: Baseline Class Denom Count GroupId
attributes.name: BaselineClassDenomCountGroupId
attributes.description: ID per Arm/Group for a Baseline Measure

attributes.label: Baseline Class Denom Count Value
attributes.name: BaselineClassDenomCountValue
attributes.description: Data per Arm/Group per Baseline Measure

attributes.label: Baseline Category
attributes.name: BaselineCategory
attributes.description: Categories under a Baseline Measure

attributes.label: Baseline Category Title
attributes.name: BaselineCategoryTitle
attributes.description: Name of distinct category for a baseline measure

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement
attributes.name: BaselineMeasurement
attributes.description: Data structure per Arm/Group per Category

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement GroupId
attributes.name: BaselineMeasurementGroupId
attributes.description: ID per Arm/Group per Category

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement Value
attributes.name: BaselineMeasurementValue
attributes.description: Data per Arm/Group per Category

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement Spread
attributes.name: BaselineMeasurementSpread

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement Lower Limit

attributes.label: Baseline Measurement Upper Limit

attributes.description: Data per Arm/Group per Category. Based on Measure Type and Measure of Dispersion (e.g., upper limit of Full Range)

attributes.name: BaselineMeasurementComment

attributes.label: Outcome Measure
attributes.name: OutcomeMeasure
